description: Aramaic/Hebrew: probably a commentary, quoting Ecclesiastes 4:12 (recto); Judaeo-Arabic/Aramaic: theological/philosophical text, discussing various degrees (darajat) of creatures. (Information from Niessen/Shivtiel.)
description_he: בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
